notes: Batch 17-B: 67 entries across diff_application.rs (31), native.rs (23), aws_credentials.rs (13). 41 translated, 26 flagged telemetry_payload. Key calls: (1) diff_application.rs DiffApplicationError::to_conversation_message strings (L109,116,121,124,127,130,133,136,138) flow into RequestFileEditsResult::DiffApplicationFailed { error } and surface to user via Display impl in agent/mod.rs:1042 as '_File edits failed: {error}_' — translated. (2) All safe_warn!/safe_debug!/safe_error! macros (warp_core::safe_log) resolve to log::warn/debug/error sinks (log file only, not UI) — flagged telemetry_payload. (3) MCP error_to_user_message function (native.rs:122-167) maps rmcp errors to user toast/dialog strings — translated. (4) notify_reconnect_waiters Err(String) (L726,740,775,1611) surface as reconnect errors to user — translated. (5) PATH toast (L763), MCP auth toast (L2035), rmcp::RmcpError::transport_creation strings (L2001,2010) — translated. (6) logger.log() calls (L1750,1810) write to MCP debug log file (user opens via `tail` in terminal pane, mixed with English server stderr) — flagged telemetry_payload to keep stream consistent. (7) aws_credentials.rs: LoadAwsCredentialsError::Display, user_facing_aws_credentials_error_message, anyhow contexts that surface via AwsCredentialsState::Failed { message } — all translated. Format placeholders {file}, {err}, {msg}, {status}, {server_name}, {err:#}, {} preserved verbatim. ASCII '...' not present in this batch. Brand literals AWS, AWS CLI, AWS Bedrock, MCP, STS, PATH preserved.
